title: Search and open a protocol from the coverage matrix
description: This verifies that a user can find a protocol on the home matrix and open its detail page after using search and filters.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a protocol name
Select a family filter that matches the chosen protocol
Sort the matrix by TVL
Verify the filtered protocol is visible in the matrix
Click the protocol entry
Verify the protocol detail page is displayed

title: Search and filter the coverage matrix to find a protocol
description: A user can search for a protocol, narrow the matrix by family, and still see the matching protocol row.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a protocol name
Select the lending family filter
Verify the matching protocol row is displayed
Verify non-matching protocol rows are hidden

title: Inspect a coverage cell before drilling into protocol details
description: This verifies that a user can inspect a protocol-feed coverage state and then open the corresponding protocol detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a protocol family filter
Sort the matrix by coverage
Open a coverage cell tooltip
Verify the coverage tooltip content is displayed
Click the protocol entry from the matrix
Verify the protocol detail page is displayed

title: Sort the matrix by protocol size and coverage
description: A user can switch the matrix ordering by TVL or volume and by coverage so the most relevant protocols rise to the top.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select the size-based sort option
Select the coverage-based sort option
Verify the matrix order changes to reflect the selected sort
Verify protocol size context is still shown for the listed rows

title: Inspect a coverage cell tooltip
description: A user can inspect a matrix cell to see the coverage status, note, and provenance for that feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Hover over a coverage cell
Verify a coverage tooltip is displayed
Verify the tooltip includes status and provenance information

title: Navigate through the top tabs and keep the active state clear
description: This verifies that a user can switch among Coverage Matrix, Feeds, and Methodology while the current tab remains clearly indicated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the Coverage Matrix tab is active
Click the Feeds tab
Verify the Feeds page is displayed and the Feeds tab is active
Click the Methodology tab
Verify the Methodology page is displayed and the Methodology tab is active
Click the Coverage Matrix tab
Verify the coverage matrix home page is displayed and the Coverage Matrix tab is active

title: Open a protocol detail page from the matrix
description: A user can drill from the matrix into a protocol detail page to continue review from a selected protocol.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a protocol name in the matrix
Verify the protocol detail page is displayed
Verify governance and feed assessment sections are available

title: Review governance and provenance on a protocol detail page
description: A user can inspect a protocol’s governance facts and provenance tags to understand the source and scope of the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/aave
Click the governance section anchor
Verify governance facts are displayed
Verify provenance tags are displayed

title: Compare protocol details and move to the next protocol
description: This verifies that a user can review a protocol’s governance, provenance, feed assessments, audits, and incidents, then continue to the next protocol.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/aave
Verify governance information is displayed
Verify provenance information is displayed
Scroll to the feed assessments section
Verify feed assessment cards are displayed
Scroll to the audits and incidents sections
Verify audits and incidents information is displayed
Click the next protocol link
Verify the next protocol detail page is displayed

title: Use the stats header to open the feeds registry
description: A user can move from the matrix summary into the feeds registry through the independent risk feeds summary tile.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the independent risk feeds summary tile
Verify the feeds registry page is displayed
Verify the feed registry overview is visible

title: Read feed assessment quotes on a protocol detail page
description: A user can review the feed assessment cards and read the verbatim quoted assessments for a protocol.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/aave
Click the feed assessments section anchor
Verify feed assessment cards are displayed
Verify verbatim assessment quotes are displayed

title: Review feed coverage by category in the registry
description: This verifies that a user can compare feed coverage across protocol categories on the feeds registry page.

steps.description: Navigate to /feeds
Verify the feed registry summaries are displayed
Verify the coverage-by-category matrix is displayed
Scroll to the blockers table
Verify blocker classifications are displayed

title: Compare feed coverage across protocol categories in the registry
description: A user can review the feeds registry to compare coverage by protocol category and identify blocker classifications.

steps.description: Navigate to /feeds
Scroll to the category coverage matrix
Verify coverage by category is displayed
Verify blocker classifications are displayed

title: Review audits and incidents on a protocol detail page
description: A user can inspect the audit history and incident history sections to assess a protocol’s past security record.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/aave
Click the audits section anchor
Click the incidents section anchor
Verify audit history is displayed
Verify incident history is displayed

title: Jump from protocol gaps to the feeds registry
description: This verifies that a user can find feed-gap explanations on a protocol page and follow the link to the feeds gaps section.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/lido
Scroll to the feed-gap explanations section
Click the link to the feeds gaps section
Verify the feeds registry page is displayed
Verify the gaps section content is displayed

title: Open the feeds gaps explanation from a not-yet-covered feed
description: A user can jump from a protocol detail page to the feeds gaps section when a feed is not yet covered.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/lido
Click a why link for a not-yet-covered feed
Verify the feeds gaps section is displayed
Verify a gap explanation is visible

title: Move from a protocol detail page to the next protocol
description: A user can continue sequential protocol review by using the protocol navigation at the bottom of a detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/aave
Click the next protocol link
Verify another protocol detail page is displayed
Verify the protocol navigation remains available

title: Understand what blocks broader feed coverage
description: This verifies that a user can inspect blocker types and the corresponding unblock path for feeds in the registry.

steps.description: Navigate to /feeds
Scroll to the blockers table
Inspect multiple feed rows in the blockers table
Verify blocker classifications are visible
Verify unblock path guidance is visible

title: Open a provider site from the feeds registry
description: A user can open a provider’s external site from the feeds registry to inspect the source behind a feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /feeds
Click a provider site link
Verify the external provider site link is available
Verify provider information is displayed in the registry

title: Confirm the methodology scope and no composite scoring rule
description: This verifies that a user can read the methodology page to confirm the app’s neutral scope and that it does not use composite scoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /methodology
Verify the scope statement is displayed
Verify the no composite scoring explanation is displayed

title: Review provenance legend and correction process
description: A user can use the methodology page to understand provenance tags and the process for correcting content.

steps.description: Navigate to /methodology
Scroll to the provenance legend
Scroll to the correction process section
Verify the provenance legend is displayed
Verify the correction process is displayed

title: Return from methodology to the matrix and keep navigation context
description: A user can move between methodology and the coverage matrix using the top navigation and preserve the active-state context.

steps.description: Navigate to /methodology
Click the coverage matrix link in the top navigation
Verify the coverage matrix page is displayed
Verify the coverage matrix tab is active

title: Handle an empty search result in the matrix
description: A user sees a clear empty state when search and filter choices produce no matching protocols.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a non-matching protocol name
Select a filter that excludes the search result
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no protocol rows are displayed

title: See pending metrics for a protocol without TVL data
description: A user can open the Morpho Vaults protocol page and see that the metric is pending rather than incorrectly showing TVL.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Morpho Vaults protocol name
Verify the protocol detail page is displayed
Verify a metric pending badge is displayed

title: Recognize curation-pending placeholders on an incomplete protocol page
description: A user can open an incomplete protocol detail page and see honest placeholder sections for uncurated governance, audit, or incident content.

steps.description: Navigate to /protocol/lido
Verify placeholder sections are displayed for uncaptured detail content
Verify the page still shows the main protocol summary
